model.identity_limit: OpenRouter and AtlasCloud expose the named upstream model, but the hosted FP8 artifact and serving implementation are opaque to this repository.

generation.rationale: Screen a substantially larger open-weight model with hidden-reference context and the same external lexical audit used by the local matrix.

procedure.execution_boundary: Remote OpenRouter API; no local model-runtime claim

deterministic_repeat.requirement: observation-only; remote repeat equality is not an acceptance gate

measurements.latency_claim_limit: Client-observed request duration includes gateway, queue, provider, and network time and is not comparable to local MLX measurements.

output.text: Wie aber kam sie hier auf meinen Tisch, und warum schauderte ich, wenn ich sie ansah? Diese Fragen wollten sich in keiner Weise beantworten lassen. Meine Blicke fielen schließlich auf den unterstrichenen Satz eines offen vor mir liegenden Buches.

reported_edits.reason: Comma before coordinating conjunction joining independent clauses
Context implies shivering/fear ('schauderte') rather than non-existent verb 'schautete'; fits audiobook narrative tone
End of question clause and start of new sentence; capitalization of 'Diese'
Noun capitalization in German; protected span 'in keiner weise' corrected for case only
End of sentence and start of new sentence; capitalization of 'Meine'

diagnostic_wer.claim_limit: Development-only diagnostic against an unverified dataset transcript; not a quality-selection result.

conclusion.claim_limit: This run screens one development fixture and API contract. Human-verified target-domain audio remains required for model selection.
